title: sideroxylon xerocarpum
intro: Sideroxylon xerocarpum, also known as the dry-fruited sideroxylon, is a plant species in the family Sapotaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine, particularly in Africa, for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting antioxidant properties. In traditional medicine, Sideroxylon xerocarpum is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, which is believed to enhance its medicinal properties.
